message:
test(io_driver): add waker dispatch verification test

Add test io_driver_dispatches_wakers_on_events that verifies IoDriver.turn()
correctly dispatches wakers when events come through the reactor.

This test addresses asupersync-me99 (CRITICAL: Fix waker dispatch in reactor
poll() implementations) by verifying that Option B (IoDriver handles waker
dispatch) is working correctly.

The test:
- Creates a LabReactor for deterministic testing
- Registers a mock source and injects a readable event
- Creates an IoDriver wrapping the reactor
- Registers a FlagWaker that sets an AtomicBool when woken
- Calls turn() and verifies the waker was actually called

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
